title: lomelosia crenata subsp. crenata
intro: Lomelosia crenata subsp. crenata, also known as the Alpine Lomelosia or Alpine Scabious, is a plant species within the genus Lomelosia, which is a type of flowering plant in the borage family. The medicinal properties of Lomelosia crenata subsp. crenata include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body and reduce inflammation and infection. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Lomelosia crenata subsp. crenata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
